note: Five end-game meta team builds — pick a strategy, then tap each member to see their part of it (weapon, Pictos, Luminas, attributes and skills) on a recreation of the in-game build screen. Maelle is the best carry so she anchors most comps; the team around her changes the gameplan. Pictos double as Luminas you can share across the party.

builds.name: Stance Carry
builds.summary: The safe, do-everything meta. The team feeds Maelle AP and Break windows; she converts them into team-wide damage from Virtuose stance. Forgiving and strong on any fight.
builds.synergy: Lune and Monoco generate AP, Breaks and buffs; Sciel banks a second nuke; Maelle cashes it all in.

members.job: The win condition — stance-dance to Virtuose and dump your biggest skills.
AP battery + Burn + heals; keep the squad topped up.
Break opener and AP refunds with Energising Parry.
Second nuke while Maelle resets stances.

builds.name: Burn Stack
builds.summary: Set the world on fire. Multiple Burn sources stack into enormous damage-over-time that ignores defenses — perfect for high-health bosses you can't burst.
builds.synergy: Maelle's Burning Canvas and Lune's Immolation/Wildfire pile on Burn; Sciel amplifies and detonates while it ticks.

members.job: Apply and refresh Burn with Burning Canvas between stance dumps.
Stack and spread Burn with Immolation and Wildfire — the main DoT engine.
Amplify damage and detonate while Burn ticks down their bar.

builds.name: Break & Burst
builds.summary: Stagger first, then delete. Shred the enemy Break gauge and unload everything during the stagger, when they take massively increased damage and can't act.
builds.synergy: Monoco breaks the gauge fast; Maelle and Lune hold their biggest skills for the stagger window and burst together.

members.job: Break specialist — pick Bestial skills that shred the gauge.
Hold Virtuose and dump the instant the enemy is Broken.
Break-assist elements + AP so the burst lands in one window.

builds.name: Parry Counter
builds.summary: All offense, all reactions. Parry and counter everything — no dodging, no downtime. The most damage in the game in skilled hands, the riskiest in unskilled ones.
builds.synergy: Verso climbs to S-Rank off counters, Maelle parries straight into Virtuose, and Monoco's Energising Parry refunds the AP to keep dumping.

members.job: Counter-DPS — climb to S-Rank and stay there.
Parry-burst carry; convert perfect parries into Virtuose damage.
Energising Parry AP battery + Break to open windows.

builds.name: Foretell Nuke
builds.summary: Charge up, then erase. Sciel banks Foretell (Sun/Moon) over a few turns for a single colossal detonation, while the team protects the set-up and chips in between nukes.
builds.synergy: Lune sets up Dark/elements and feeds AP, Maelle provides consistent damage and parries, and Sciel lands the haymaker.

members.job: The nuke carry — stack Foretell and detonate for a massive hit.
Set up Dark/elements, heal and feed AP for the next charge.
Consistent burst and parries between Sciel's nukes.

maelle.name: Maelle
maelle.summary: Stance-dance into Virtuose and unload near-100% crit hits without ever taking damage. Glass Cannon + Immaculate make her a one-woman wipe button — as long as the team keeps her on AP and she keeps parrying.

pictos.name: Immaculate
pictos.effect: Big damage bonus while you've taken no damage this battle.

pictos.name: Glass Cannon
pictos.effect: 30%+ increased damage, but you can't be healed.

pictos.name: Inverted Affinity
pictos.effect: Flips a drawback into an advantage for her scaling.

maelle.statsFocus: Stack Critical Rate toward 100% and Speed for extra turns; Health/Defense come from gear, not points.
playstyle: Open in Offensive stance, build to Virtuose, then dump your biggest skills during an extra turn.
Parry everything — Immaculate only keeps your damage maxed while you stay untouched.
Spend the AP the team feeds you; never sit on a full bar.
pros: Snowballs once stances are set up
cons: Depends on the team for AP

lune.name: Lune
lune.summary: Bank elemental Stains to power empowered spells, loop Burn for damage-over-time, and feed the party AP with Energising Parry. Fast, safe and flexible — the glue of every comp.

pictos.name: Energising Parry
pictos.effect: A successful parry grants AP — fuels the whole team.

pictos.name: Charging Critical
pictos.effect: Builds Critical Rate as you act, so your spells start critting.

pictos.name: Shortcut
pictos.effect: Reduces the AP cost of skills so you cast more per turn.

lune.statsFocus: Speed first (act often to keep Stains, Burn and AP flowing), then Critical Rate.
playstyle: Generate elemental Stains early, then spend them on empowered spells.
Keep Burn applied for free damage-over-time while the team sets up.
Parry to bank AP for the carry, and heal/cleanse when needed.
cons: Stain management has a learning curve
Lower personal burst than the carries

sciel.name: Sciel
sciel.summary: A slow build to an enormous payoff. Stack Foretell (Sun/Moon) and Dark, weaken enemies, then detonate for a massive hit while scaling through criticals and survivability.

pictos.name: Immaculate
pictos.effect: Big damage bonus while undamaged — pairs with her survivability.

pictos.name: Glass Cannon
pictos.effect: 30%+ damage, no healing — cash in her detonations.

pictos.name: Inverted Affinity
pictos.effect: Turns a drawback into an advantage for her scaling.

sciel.statsFocus: Luck for Critical Rate plus Defense to survive the build-up; she scales with crits.
playstyle: Stack Foretell charges (Sun/Moon) over a few turns.
Apply Dark and weaken enemies, then unleash her detonation skills for a massive hit.
Use her survivability so the long set-up never gets interrupted.

monoco.name: Monoco
monoco.summary: The toolbox. Copies enemy abilities through the Bestial Wheel, shreds Break gauges to stagger tough foes, and runs high-Speed parry support to keep AP flowing.

pictos.name: Energising Parry
pictos.effect: Parrying grants AP — the team's AP battery.

pictos.name: Immaculate
pictos.effect: Damage bonus while undamaged — supported by his parry uptime.

pictos.name: Charging Critical
pictos.effect: Builds Critical Rate as he acts for steadier damage.

monoco.statsFocus: Speed above all (act first to set up Break), with Defense to keep him on the field.
playstyle: Pick Bestial Wheel skills that match the fight (Break, damage or utility).
Focus the enemy Break gauge to stagger them for the whole party.
Parry constantly — Energising Parry refunds AP so the team can spend freely.
cons: Reward depends on knowing the fight

verso.name: Verso
verso.summary: Lives on the edge. Verso climbs combat Ranks (S being the peak) where his damage explodes, fuelled by parries and counters. Precise and devastating once he's at S-Rank.

pictos.name: Confident Fighter
pictos.effect: 30% increased damage but can't be Healed — leans into aggression.

pictos.name: Perilous Parry
pictos.effect: Tighter parry window for a much bigger reward — high risk, high payoff.

verso.statsFocus: Critical Rate (Luck) and Speed; he wants to act fast and crit to climb Ranks.
playstyle: Start fights and immediately work up to S-Rank for the damage multiplier.
Parry and counter relentlessly — Augmented Counter is most of his damage.
Don't let your Rank drop; avoid hits that knock you down a tier.
